emails.subject: Re: Fee discrepancies
emails.body: Re: Fee discrepancies I checked both of these deals, and they each show no broker fee. Mark Fischer might have just changed this, but let me know if it's still not showing up in your system. Thanks, kate Evelyn Metoyer@ENRON 12/13/2000 11:55 AM
